title: Item Limit
description: As the name suggests this plugin allows you to limit any item players can only hold up to a set maximum amount of an item in their inventory. If a player has more than the allowed limit, the extra items will automatically be dropped from the inventory
body:
A very basic and easy to use Minecraft Item Limiter. Setup takes only about 2 minutes depending on how many items you add to the list simple and straightforward commands making it beginner-friendly


```
/itemlimit add (item) (number)    - Set a limit for an item
/itemlimit remove (item)          - Remove the limit from an item
/itemlimit check (item)           - Check if an item has a limit
/itemlimit list                   - View all limited items
/itemlimit clear                  - Clear ALL item limits (use with caution)

```
